description: Event venues discovered in Forshaga and Kil, Värmland County, Sweden

venues.name: Forshaga Folkets Hus
venues.notes: Community center with concerts, theater, cinema, and conferences. Houses cinema (bio).

venues.name: Kulturhuset Forshaga
venues.notes: Municipal cultural center. Houses youth activities (Hubben), fritidsgård.

venues.name: Kulturhuset i Deje
venues.notes: Cultural center in Deje. Also houses Deje library.

venues.name: Forshaga Deje Teaterförening
venues.notes: Theatre association, part of Riksteatern. Organizes theater performances.

venues.name: Gamla Kraftstationen i Deje
venues.notes: Former power station now functioning as art gallery and cultural meeting place for theater, art, and music.

venues.name: Pub Luna
venues.notes: Pub at Restaurant Luna Lucet. Has large screen TV.

venues.name: Kulturhuset KilArena
venues.notes: Cultural center in Kil. Hosts concerts, theater, dance performances, lectures, and conferences.

venues.name: Glada Killingen Pub & Restaurang
venues.notes: Pub and restaurant with music events.

venues.name: Guldapan
venues.notes: Bar focusing on beer, wine, and delicacies.

venues.name: Kils bibliotek
venues.notes: Library in Kil, also serves as cultural venue.

venues.name: Kunskapsteatern
venues.notes: Educational theater. Has collaborated with Kils Kulturskola.
